creator: ganbold-freebsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
I can not seem to run queries like 'create database testing'.
show processlist output is like:

MariaDB [(none)]> show processlist;
+----+-------------+-----------+------+---------+-------+----------------------+-------------------------+----------+
| Id | User        | Host      | db   | Command | Time  | State                | Info                    | Progress |
+----+-------------+-----------+------+---------+-------+----------------------+-------------------------+----------+
|  1 | system user |           | NULL | Sleep   | 12094 | wsrep aborter idle   | NULL                    |    0.000 |
|  2 | system user |           | NULL | Sleep   | 12094 | NULL                 | NULL                    |    0.000 |
|  4 | root        | localhost | NULL | Query   | 11693 | checking permissions | create database mm_test |    0.000 |
|  5 | root        | localhost | NULL | Query   |     0 | init                 | show processlist        |    0.000 |
+----+-------------+-----------+------+---------+-------+----------------------+-------------------------+----------+
4 rows in set (0.00 sec)
